creator: a.andersson.thn@gmail.com
text:
After update and boot of 11.2-RC3 I am experiencing a weird behavior with the keyboard. After ~15-20 seconds or so the computer start with continiously beeping short beeps. 

It also incorrectly identifies my keyboard as a USB keyboard. It is infact a ps2 keyboard.

Pressing scroll lock stops the beeping. But at that point I am unable to use the keyboard.

https://paste.sh/k_9VbFQi#RxHWsEVE_rsi2lN3XdxdOTWS Has the relevant output from the keyboard related stuff in dmesg.

Full dmesg: https://paste.sh/z2wvPG_d#8weG1dfz25kGWtQ19lAVeYvD

Let me know if you need access to this machine.
